company: NovaTech SaaS is a premier platform dedicated to providing cloud-based business solutions.
billing_policies: All paid subscriptions are subject to a standard 14-day refund policy.
account_and_login: For password reset steps: Visit the login page, click 'Forgot Password', and follow the instructions sent to your registered email.
product_features: Our core features include real-time collaboration, comprehensive reporting tools, and seamless CRM integrations.
supported_platforms: Our service is available via web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and as native applications for iOS and Android.
common_issues: Users occasionally experience brief delays with third-party integrations or need assistance resolving API rate limit errors.
escalation_rules: Escalate any legal inquiries immediately. For billing, trigger an escalation for any disputes or refund amounts over £500.
internal_contacts: Tier 1 Support: tier1@novatech.com, Tier 2 Support: tier2@novatech.com, Legal: legal@novatech.com
data_and_privacy: We adhere to strict data security protocols, ensuring all user data is fully encrypted and GDPR compliant.
tone_guidelines: Always communicate with the customer using a professional, empathetic, and solution-driven tone.
